AuthorDetails.Name: Pasang Tamang
AuthorDetails.Description: Pasang Tamang is a long-time Umbraco specialist and web developer with a strong focus on .NET technologies, developer productivity, and modern CMS solutions. Having worked with Umbraco since 2010, he has extensive experience building scalable web platforms and digital experiences using the Microsoft technology stack. Beyond development, he actively contributes to the tech community through speaking engagements, technical writing, community events, and open-source contributions, including developing packages for the Umbraco ecosystem.

Description: AI Diagnostics analyzes application logs using AI to simplify complex issues by identifying possible root causes and providing actionable suggestions to fix them.

RelatedPackages.Description: Required: install Umbraco.AI and at least one provider package, then configure connections and chat profiles in the backoffice.

Title: AI Diagnostics
